title: Fix podman ps --filter ancestor to match exact ImageName/ImageID
body:
Reference Issue: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/10066

Following PR brings parity between how `docker` and `podman` behaves to `ps --filter ancestor=`. Fix for https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/10066

comments.body:
Thanks @flouthoc
Please add a test. This is important to prevent future regressions. I think you can add a test case here https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/test/e2e/ps_test.go#L258.

@edsantiago @rhatdan @Luap99  I think [NO TEST NEEDED] only allows me to bypass the part of adding additional tests for fix. The CI tests would still kick-in right ? But anyways let me add tests and remove that.

@flouthoc you are correct: CI will run all tests, but will forgive you for not including a new regression test in your commit. The string is misnamed (my mistake at design time), it should have been 'no **new** tests needed'.
@edsantiago Thanks  :pray:  will add regression for this

When running

```
docker run --rm -d  docker.io/library/alpine:3.12  sh -c "sleep 10000" 
docker ps --filter ancestor=docker.io/library/alpine
```
there is no match.

I haven't built this PR to test it but my gut feeling by looking at the code tells me there
will be a match when running this test in Podman.

```
podman run --rm -d  docker.io/library/alpine:3.12  sh -c "sleep 10000" 
podman ps --filter ancestor=docker.io/library/alpine
```
(3.12 is an old Alpine version).

I might be wrong as I don't know so much about Golang.
@flouthoc Can you fix the issues found so we can merge this PR?
@rhatdan Sure can i get few days. I was recently tested +ve for Covid. Feeling much better now so i should be able to wrap this in few days.

@rhatdan @giuseppe I have added the test case for the fix provided in the PR.  

@eriksjolund You are right `docker` only matches on the basis of imagename if tag is `latest` for other tags full explicit match is needed. I have fixed that also in this PR.

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

LGTM
@flouthoc nice work, hope you're on the upswing health wise
